metaTitle: Clinique du VR | RV inspection, maintenance and repair in Gatineau
metaDescription: Clinique du VR offers RV inspection, maintenance, repair, detailing, and buying and selling support in Gatineau, Ottawa, Outaouais, and Laurentides.

hero.logoAlt: Clinique du VR logo — RV maintenance, repair and detailing
hero.title: Clinique du VR — RV inspection, maintenance and repair in Gatineau
hero.tagline: Your water infiltration specialist in Outaouais

introCards.heading: Why Choose Clinique du VR?
introCards.body: Specialized and attentive service for RV maintenance, repair and detailing. We focus on clear explanations, practical condition assessment and recommendations that match your real situation. We operate a year-round workshop as well as a mobile unit to serve you better depending on the type of work required. Speed, transparency and careful execution from start to finish are part of how we work.

introCards.heading: Our Services
introCards.body: Preventive maintenance • Mechanical and cosmetic repairs • RV inspections • Refresh work • Cleaning and detailing • Custom interventions

seoSections.heading: RV service in Gatineau and nearby areas
seoSections.body: Clinique du VR supports RV, trailer and caravan owners with common service needs such as pre-purchase inspection, preventive maintenance, water leak repair, roof work, refresh work and detailing. The workshop is based in Gatineau and also serves Ottawa, Outaouais, and Laurentides, while also taking on selected projects elsewhere in Quebec and Ontario.

seoSections.heading: A clearer service structure
seoSections.body: When an RV shows signs of wear, water intrusion or visible deterioration, the first step is to understand the real condition of the vehicle. From there, we help guide you toward inspection, maintenance, repair, detailing or buying and selling support based on what is actually needed.

cta.heading: Request your free estimate
cta.subheading: Inspection and estimate with no obligation

contactPanel.ctaText: Free and confidential estimate. Call us or send us a message.

items.quote: Cedric was on time, explained everything clearly and delivered the results the next day as promised.
items.author: Jesse Brook

items.quote: Efficient company, easy to communicate with, and professional work from start to finish.
